title: The Guns Used By WILLE
wikitext:
[]: The Guns Used By WILLE             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Apr 13, 2015 2:20 pm I want to update this page on IMFDB to include Evangelion 3.0. But I don't know exactly what kind of assault rifle the Wille officers are pointing at Shinji. If anyone could give me a rough guess, I'd greatly appreciate it. http://www.imfdb.org/wiki/Rebuild_of_Evangelion

[]:             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Mon Apr 13, 2015 2:34 pm Looks like a Heckler & Koch G36 or maybe a XM8 rifle.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Apr 13, 2015 2:51 pm The XM8 appears to be the more likely candidate. In the pic, the rifles have no holes in the stock. Also the scopes. Thanks again!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Apr 13, 2015 4:23 pm That is some atrocious video quality you got. Have a proper one: http://i.imgur.com/bTxznKQ.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Apr 13, 2015 4:33 pm Thank you, that helps immensely.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Apr 13, 2015 7:47 pm Popping in since Ornette asked on IRC. Closest match is probably the XM8 Compact, though the detail is so bad that it could also be a futuristic mashup of XM8 and G36K/C parts.
